prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: result screen UI chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet for victory, defeat, boss reward, and run summary UI components.
Subject: two large ornamental panel backplates plus matching button bars, title crests, reward slots, and summary card frames laid out as a component sheet.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, readable on mobile and desktop.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet with spacing; keep all components isolated and not touching edges.
Color palette: dark stone, steel, antique gold, subtle red/blue accents.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no extra frame/panel/matte backdrop beyond the actual UI components; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside UI artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
